articles.title: Shiba Inu Burn Rate Explodes Over 4000%, Igniting Optimism for $0.001 SHIB Price Target
articles.description: The coin experienced a remarkable 4000% increase in its burn rate in May, fueling optimism about its future path to a $0.001 SHIB Price.

articles.title: Two Brothers Charged in $25 Million Ethereum Scam
articles.description: DOJ charges brothers Anton and James Peraire-Bueno for a $25 million Ethereum blockchain attack.

articles.title: Trader Predicts 1,660% Rally for Under-the-Radar Altcoin, Updates Outlook on Shiba Inu and Chainlink
articles.description: A closely followed crypto strategist believes that astronomical gains are on the horizon for an altcoin initially built on the Ethereum (ETH) blockchain. Analyst Ali Martinez tells his 62,100 followers on the social media platform X that the native asset of a supply-chain management project VeChain (VET) appears to be mirroring its previous cycle’s market […]
